title: Onboarding - Check onboarding screens UI
scenario: Verify the UI of onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal pages) matches Figma design reference
steps: Open the app and navigate to the onboarding flow.
Verify the UI of the Organized page matches the Figma reference: https://www.figma.com/design/kVruq94TvQDlPCELGmJcs5/Studio-Mobile-Spec?node-id=9176-39256&t=TUmBPGsfUnsn5Xme-0
Verify the UI of the Up-to-Date page matches the Figma reference.
Verify the UI of the Personal page matches the Figma reference.
expected: All three onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal) match the Figma design reference.
